params.name: Engelbart's Mouse
params.description:
On Sept 25, 1968 AD, at the Fall Computer Fair in San Francisco, people saw a computer mouse for the first time.
Invented by Engelbart, an American inventor, it is the first computer mouse in the world. It looks like a wooden box with a pair of metal wheels on the bottom and only one button on the top. It is connected to a computer through a cable. Maybe it doesn't look cool, it works the same as a modern-day mouse.
